name: SOLID
summary: 5 principles OOP: Single Responsibility, Open/Closed, Liskov, Interface Segregation, Dependency Inversion.

facts.text: Single Responsibility: 1 class 1 lý do thay đổi
Open/Closed: mở để extend, đóng để modify
Liskov: subtype phải thay thế được base type
Dependency Inversion: depend on abstractions, not concretions

danger: over-engineering: SOLID quá cứng nhắc → complexity
